Advance Booking · Bollywood · Dhurandhar 2 · March 9, 2026 2 MIN READ
Breaking — Mar 9, 2026

₹20 Crore and Counting. The Trade Is Out of Words.

Ten days before release, Dhurandhar 2 has already broken every premiere booking record in Hindi film history. Box Office India calls it remarkable. The numbers call it something else entirely.

By The Boxoffy Team · March 9, 2026 · Sources: BOI · Nishit Shaw · Sumit Kadel · Jaiswal · ItsJat32 · Sacnilk
₹12.29 Cr
Premiere Gross India
2.06L
Tickets Sold India
~₹20 Cr
Total Advance (India)
$1.7M
US Weekend Pre-Sales

Box Office India doesn't do superlatives lightly. When they headlined their Monday morning report "Dhurandhar 2 Continues With Remarkable Advances," the trade took notice. By Monday March 9, Ranveer Singh's spy sequel had crossed 1.5 lakh tickets on BookMyShow India alone — and over 2 lakh tickets overall across all platforms. The premiere gross from paid previews, tracked by Sacnilk, stood at ₹12.29 crore. In two days.

That number matters because it has already surpassed Stree 2's paid preview record of ₹10 crore — the previous benchmark for a Hindi film. This wasn't achieved with fan-club blocks or corporate allocations. It was organic. Seat by seat.

"Showcasing is HUGE. Collection from Paid Previews can reach upto ₹30 Cr nett. #Dhurandhar2"
Sumit Kadel (@SumitkadeI) · March 7–9, 2026

The overseas numbers are equally striking. Trade tracker Nishit Shaw reported 38,545 tickets sold across 557 US locations, with premiere pre-sales already at $618,911. Opening day bookings push that figure close to $890K. The full weekend pre-sales have crossed $1.7 million — and there are still 10 days to release.

Rohit Jaiswal, who called Dhurandhar 1's trajectory to the rupee, has his Day 1 estimate sitting at ₹85–90 Cr net — and notes the post-trailer momentum may push that floor higher. ItsJat32, who documented Dhurandhar 1's run across 8 weekends, puts it simply: the franchise energy hasn't been at this level since KGF 2.

Metric Source Figure
Premiere Gross IndiaSacnilk₹12.29 Cr

US Opening Day AdvanceVenky Box Office~$890K
US Weekend Pre-SalesVenky Box Office$1.7 Million
Stree 2 Premiere Record (beaten)BOI₹10 Cr ✓
Boxoffy Verdict · Mar 9, 2026

The advance booking story for Dhurandhar 2 is no longer about predictions — it's about documentation. Every record it was expected to challenge, it has already broken. Paid premiere record: gone. US pre-sales trajectory: unprecedented. And the film is still ten days away. March 19 is not a release date. It's a reckoning.
